channel.title: Johannes Rabauer | Blog
channel.description: Live coding sessions, Java deep-dives, cloud-native patterns, and engineering craft.

item.title: Building a Live Coding Stream Setup — What I Learned
item.description: After six months of weekly live coding sessions on YouTube, here's everything I wish I knew before starting: gear, OBS config, Java project structure, and how to stay calm when the build breaks on stream.
